title: bus.redis.stream.health v1
description: Periodic Redis Streams health metrics emitted by redis-mirror adapter (configurable interval, default 60s). Lets dashboards and alerting track stream size, trim pressure, and mirror throughput without polling Redis directly.

mirrored_total.description: Events successfully XADD'd to Redis since last restart

dead_lettered.description: Events dead-lettered due to schema violations

streams.description: Per-stream stats sampled at report time

oldest_ms.description: Age of oldest entry in milliseconds

offset_file.description: Path to the tail-offset persistence file
